Page 1 — Clean Page 2 — All Templates Page 3 — Chosen Approved templates only — these are wired to the pipeline

Chosen Ones

Oak Park AI Hub · approved + locked · one per series · pipeline-ready

OPC — Oak Park Construction
#0A0A0A
Obsidian
#CBCC10
Lime
#F0EBE3
Cream
#2A2A2A
Surface
#808080
Muted
TIP OF THE WEEK
FORMAT-010
Main category · no sub-series
Weekly educational post. One construction or renovation concept per post — stat on slide 2, step-by-step list on slide 3, product/material callout on slide 4, CTA on slide 5. No named person required — any relevant photo fills the context slot. Default OPC series.
slide 1 / 5
News — Brazil
#0D0D0D
Ink
#C9A84C
Gold
#2D6A4F
Deep Green
#C62828
Danger Red
#F5F0E8
Cream
#1C3A28
Forest
Brazil — Shared Series
FORMAT-002 variant
Brazil News · multi-series base
Shared template structure for Brazil news series. Gold palette, dark background. Supports Quem Decidiu, Verificamos, A Conta que Ninguém Pagou, Arquivo Aberto series.
slide 1 / —
Brazil — Cover · Main Character
FORMAT-STANDALONE-BR
Brazil News · story with a main person
Use when the story has a main actor (politician, official, CEO). Yellow bg (#FFE500), blue circle blob (#0057CC), B&W grayscale person left side, bold condensed headline top-right. All elements isolated via CSS variables — pipeline replaces person photo via .sticker-slot and recolors via --blob-color / --bg-color / --hl-color. PT-BR. 3 slides: Cover, O que aconteceu, Fontes.
slide 1 / 3
Brazil — Cover · Main Character v2
FORMAT-STANDALONE-BR-v2
Brazil News · story with a main person
Same layer architecture as v1 but inverted: dark (#111111) bg + yellow (#FFE500) circle. Zero flag read. White text + yellow accents. Person placeholder is opaque (bg color) so circle never bleeds through. Circle repositioned center-right for clean orb effect. PT-BR. 3 slides.
slide 1 / 3
News — USA
#0D0D0D
Ink
#CC1F2D
Signal Red
#14213D
Deep Navy
#E8DECE
Parchment
#E63946
Hot Red
#2C3E6B
Slate
USA — Shared Series
FORMAT-001 variant
USA News · multi-series base
Shared template structure for USA news series. Red/navy palette, dark background. Supports History They Left Out, The Chain, Ground News series.
slide 1 / —
USA — Cover · Main Character
FORMAT-STANDALONE-US
USA News · story with a main person
Use when the story has a main actor (senator, official, executive). Light bg (#F5F5F5), red circle blob (#CC1F2D), B&W grayscale person left side, bold condensed headline top-right. Mirror of Brazil Standalone — same CSS variable architecture. Pipeline replaces person photo via .sticker-slot and recolors via --blob-color / --bg-color / --hl-color. EN. 3 slides: Cover, What Happened, Sources.
slide 1 / 3
